extension.description: Bridge between claude.ai and VS Code. One-click conversation import via the Exportal Companion Chrome extension — run "Exportal: Show bridge pairing token" to connect.
command.importFromZip.title: Exportal: Import claude.ai ZIP
command.showPairingInfo.title: Exportal: Show bridge pairing token
command.sendSessionToClaudeAi.title: Exportal: Send Claude Code session to claude.ai
configuration.title: Exportal
configuration.autoAttachToClaudeCode.des: After importing a conversation, open the Claude Code panel and attach the exported Markdown as an @-mention. Requires the official Claude Code extension.
